entity.name: Zhang West Houston Housing LLC
entity.taxElection: Disregarded entity / pass-through taxation; U.S. Federal income on net rental income; Texas — no state income tax; related-party master lease to GoWell Americas LLC subject to Section 267/482 IRC related-party rules; transfer-pricing study required for SEC/auditor review in connection with U.S. public listing

owners.name: Zhang Xi
owners.role: Sole member — ultimate beneficial owner via Zhang Family Trust
owners.notes: Holding through Zhang Family Trust BVI vehicle; GoWell Americas LLC is master lessee, not an owner

capitalContributions.notes: Housing complex acquisition — $9.3M total consideration; $5.2M equity, $3.65M Regions Bank senior loan, $0.45M seller note; Zhang-controlled LLC as buyer, not GoWell OpCo
Building A renovation — kitchen, bathrooms, common areas Phase 1; recouped via GoWell master lease rent review
HVAC replacement Phase 1 — Building A east wing (24 units); funded from LLC reserves
Building B exterior waterproofing + parking reseal; pre-refinancing capex to maintain property condition

debtSummary.loanType: Commercial Term Loan — Multi-Family / Workforce Housing
debtSummary.covenants: DSCR ≥ 1.25x (stressed to market rents); LTV ≤ 65%; occupancy floor 75%; no change of control without lender consent; GoWell master lease must remain in force; Zhang Xi limited personal guarantee (burn-off after DSCR > 1.25x for 2 consecutive quarters)
debtSummary.security: First deed of trust on 1720 Eldridge Pkwy housing complex; assignment of master lease income (GoWell Americas LLC); UCC-1 financing statement; Zhang Xi limited personal guarantee
debtSummary.notes: CRITICAL: maturity 2026-08-15 — lender outreach must commence June 2026 at latest. Refinancing options: (A) Regions Bank renewal/extension, (B) new lender — Frost Bank / Texas Capital, (C) CMBS execution if occupancy improves to 80%+. Refinancing strategy must address below-market master lease rent vs. market to pass DSCR underwriting

debtSummary.covenants: Subordinated to Regions Bank first lien; no prepayment without Regions Bank consent; intercreditor agreement in place
debtSummary.security: Second lien deed of trust (subordinated); intercreditor agreement with Regions Bank
debtSummary.notes: Seller note maturing Feb 2027 — secondary maturity event following Regions Bank Aug 2026. Repayment may be funded from refinancing proceeds or asset-level cash reserves. High rate (8.25%) creates incentive for early payoff at refinancing.

debtSummary.amortisation: Revolving — no amortisation; drawn amounts converted to term on maturity
debtSummary.covenants: Draws subject to approved scope; co-terminus with Regions Bank term loan; undrawn commitment expires at maturity
debtSummary.security: Cross-collateralised with Regions Bank first lien
debtSummary.notes: HVAC / life-safety capex line; undrawn as at May 2026; Phase 2 HVAC scope ($180K–$220K) ready for execution pending refinancing confirmation; drawing this line complicates maturity wall — coordinate with Regions Bank refinancing timeline

guaranteesObligations.notes: Zhang Xi limited personal guarantee on Regions Bank term loan; burn-off trigger: DSCR > 1.25x for 2 consecutive tested quarters (currently failing — DSCR 0.09x on subsidised rents vs. market); must be disclosed as contingent liability in U.S. listing prospectus

guaranteesObligations.type: Related-party master lease — U.S. listing disclosure obligation
guaranteesObligations.notes: GoWell Americas LLC corporate housing master lease from Zhang West Houston Housing LLC is a material related-party transaction; must be disclosed in S-1/F-1 prospectus; below-market subsidy ($450/mo vs. $850–$950 market) requires transfer-pricing justification; IRC Section 482 arm's-length standard applies; legal opinion on related-party lease structure recommended pre-filing
